subject: 123Kasi
value: A GitHub Pages media site with a homepage feed generated from folders or albums, ordered newest to oldest.

subject: 123Kasi
value: The GitHub Actions workflow and generated data/feed.json system are implemented. Folder additions and deletions can update the feed index.

subject: 123Kasi
value: Use a lime-green rounded bold identity with a simple K favicon inside a lime circle; this superseded an earlier red-and-black direction.

subject: 123Kasi
value: The current version is an owner-uploaded static MVP. Public visitor uploads would require a later backend stage with storage, accounts, moderation and reporting.

subject: WebPfyer
value: WebPfyer is no longer treated as a missing generic Other Projects build. A working repository exists and the product is now the universal-converter foundation inside the FYER ecosystem.

subject: ML CODE
value: A lightweight code editor with live preview, designed as another browser-based development utility.

subject: Formfyer
value: Formfyer was selected as the preferred form-related product or system name. Its relationship to the wider FYER ecosystem still needs definition.

subject: Kingship Operations Brain
value: Expand an Obsidian vault into a comprehensive Kingship Christian Centre knowledge system covering finance, ministries, music, training, teaching, creativity, outreach, planning and risk prevention.

subject: Children's Books
value: Create square illustrated children's books featuring Eliora as a princess and Elroi as a confident young boy, with Bluey-like warmth, zoomed-out environments and text integrated into the page composition.

subject: The Sleepy Dragon
value: A 20-page children's book titled The Sleepy Dragon was completed; later work focused on expanding vocabulary and language richness.
